name: library-inventory-mern
description: A full-stack Library Inventory Management System built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). This application allows librarians to manage books and members through a secure, JWT-authenticated interface.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run dev
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client -- --open"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
